title: Woodfordia floribunda
taxonomy: Woodfordia floribunda is classified within the family Lythraceae, a family of flowering plants commonly known as the loosestrife family. The classification of Woodfordia floribunda is subject to ongoing research and revision in the field of plant systematics.
